recognition: Lebanese Ministry of Education and Higher Education recognizes BAU degrees according to BAU admissions page snippet.

general_criteria: Master's applicants must hold a Bachelor's degree from BAU or another recognized university.
For faculties other than Human Sciences and Law & Political Science, Master's admission additionally requires minimum CGPA 2.33 or 70%.
PhD applicants in Human Sciences and Law & Political Science require a Master's degree with minimum CGPA 2.33 or 70%.
Other faculties require a Master's degree with minimum CGPA 3.00 or 80%.
faculty_specific_requirements: Arabic, English and French language/literature applicants must pass a special admission exam.
Law & Political Science applicants must attend an interview plus Arabic and foreign-language exam.
Dentistry applicants are required to attend interview, practical exam and written exam.

general: Official equivalence of the Bachelor's degree from the Lebanese Ministry of Education and Higher Education or a receipt confirming equivalency application.
Copy of identity card or passport for non-Lebanese applicants.
Recent passport-size photo endorsed by the relevant authorities.
English Language Proficiency Test Scores, if applicable.
phd_additional: Official equivalence of the Master's degree from the Lebanese Ministry of Education and Higher Education or a receipt confirming equivalency application.
program_dependent: National Colloquium Examination for Medicine, Dentistry and some Health Sciences programs.
Two years of work experience after the Bachelor's degree for MBA.
Five years of work experience after the Bachelor's degree, including a two-year MBA program, for DBA.

language_requirements.bau_graduates: BAU graduates are exempted from language proficiency examinations.
language_requirements.non_bau_applicants: Non-BAU applicants must demonstrate language proficiency through a BAU language exam or recognized exam scores.
language_requirements.remediation: Students scoring 50%-59% on the BAU English or French language exam must successfully complete the relevant course.

deadlines.general_note: Applications are submitted during admission periods assigned by the University and announced on BAU website.

scholarships.program_based: BAU provides tuition fee reduction support to newly admitted eligible Master applicants in listed faculties, subject to CGPA and scholarship terms.
scholarships.merit_master: BAU grants a 50% tuition discount on course fees for the Master's degree to two eligible BAU graduates with the highest ranks and CGPA at least 3.33.
scholarships.merit_phd: BAU grants a 100% tuition discount on course fees to five eligible students holding a BAU Master degree, subject to published academic, publication, interview, and service conditions.

financial_aid.notes: Official BAU financial aid and scholarships page is linked from graduate pages; graduate-specific scholarship details are captured in scholarships.

accreditation.notes: University-level accreditation page is linked from BAU graduate pages; program-level accreditation remains null unless explicitly listed in program records.

international_students.required_document_note: Non-Lebanese applicants must provide an officially endorsed passport copy or identity document as applicable.

notes: Tuition fees are subject to change at any time without prior notice.
The new tuition fees apply to all continuing and new students enrolled in postgraduate programs.
